task_name: BP-C1 Council Watch Loop And Init
goal: Extend the BP-C1 Council Kernel with a local dependency-free watch loop and session init sequence, without starting BP-C2 modules or adding package dependencies.
scope_out: No auth, secrets, DB, deploy, live Builder, AICOS write, or Soulmatch copy
claims: tools/maya-council-watcher.cjs can initialize a Council session with queued tasks and empty dedup state.
tools/maya-council-watcher.cjs can watch the agents directory with fs.watch, debounce writes, and process changed agent JSON files.
The watch loop ignores temp files and does not require new dependencies.
Tests cover session init and event-driven processing through the watch loop.
assumptions: A dependency-free fs.watch loop is sufficient for the first BP-C1 local runtime slice.
await-write-finish can be represented in v0 by a debounce delay before processing the changed file.
Long-running process orchestration and child-agent spawning remain later tasks.
dod: git diff --name-only contains only allowed files.
stop_conditions: Auth, secrets, DB, deploy, live Builder, AICOS write, or Soulmatch copy becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-088 built callable Council Kernel functions. The missing BP-C1 piece is a local watch loop and session init, while BP-C2 remains blocked.
